name: AI Radar Wiki
description: Automated AI knowledge base for product managers — 4-pillar system covering model capabilities, product patterns, ecosystem tools, and business trends.
agent_instructions: This is a self-evolving AI knowledge base. To consume: 1) Fetch graph.json for the full knowledge graph (nodes + edges with pm_score weights). 2) Fetch index.md for categorized content listing. 3) Fetch individual .md files from entities/ or concepts/ for detailed pages. 4) Each page has YAML frontmatter with pillar, pm_score, tags metadata. 5) Data updates every 4 hours automatically.
